block_01: Quick and simple option for deposits
block_02: Traders in Chile can now conveniently make deposits via local bank transfers. Nine new local banks are available for easy and secure processing.
block_06: Log in to the IQ Option website and click ‘Deposit’ on the right side of your screen.
block_08: Choose the amount you would like to deposit and your preferred local bank. Then click ‘Go to Payment’.
block_10: Khipu, Banco Falabella, Banco CrediChile, Banco BICE, Banco Security, BCI, Banco de Chile, Banco Santander, Banco Estado
block_12: Enter your RUT number and confirm your payment.
